items.title: Hyperparameter tuning with validation curves
items.description: Grid-search tree depth, regularization strength, or network width using validation error — not training error — to land between underfitting and overfitting.

items.title: Production model monitoring
items.description: Drift in live metrics vs offline validation can reveal overfitting to historical quirks or underfitting after distribution shift; teams retrain with adjusted capacity or regularization.

items.title: AutoML and architecture search
items.description: NAS and AutoML frameworks score candidate models on held-out data to avoid selecting overfit configs that ace training but fail deployment.

items.title: Data collection prioritization
items.description: Learning curves show when more labeled data helps (variance-limited overfitting) vs when feature or model work is needed (bias-limited underfitting).

items.title: Baseline vs production model reviews
items.description: Comparing a simple baseline to a complex model on train and val splits clarifies whether added complexity fixes underfitting or merely overfits.
